name: Book Club Discussion Guide
description: Generate book club discussion guides with questions and themes

agents.name: Book Researcher
agents.purpose: Research the book for discussion material
agents.system_prompt_hint: Research the book thoroughly. Find: plot summary, major themes, author's intent, literary devices, historical context, and critical reception. Identify controversial or thought-provoking elements.

agents.name: Guide Writer
agents.purpose: Write a book club discussion guide
agents.system_prompt_hint: Create a discussion guide with: book overview (spoiler-free intro and full summary), 15-20 discussion questions organized by theme, character analysis prompts, thematic explorations, author background, similar book recommendations, and activity suggestions for the meeting.

suggestion_card.title: Book Club Guide
suggestion_card.subtitle: Create discussion guides
suggestion_card.prompt_template: Create a book club guide for [book title]

author: agentfactory
